2008.issue: [S2008] Version 2.5.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_visualization/items/cssMessage" attribute "label" uses key "Message" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.logparser/blob/master/package.json)
